purpose: Deterministic, exact 8-token shingle-overlap measurement for locally staged documents. Builds a sealed SQLite inverted index, queries one document, or writes a deterministic same-draft cross-stage candidate report using directional containment and Jaccard diagnostics. The 0.35 and 0.60 containment tiers are operational, uncalibrated review thresholds; this tool neither calls a pair a duplicate nor makes an authorship, provenance, quality, or AI/human claim.
use_when: You need a local, exact, reproducible review queue for possible near-verbatim overlap among explicitly staged documents.
You need to compare one bounded UTF-8 document against a sealed index, or compare distinct stages of the same opaque draft identifier before review.
You need aggregate console receipts and a private report artifact that contains opaque operator identifiers but never source prose, raw tokens, shingles, paths, or content digests.
do_not_use_when: You need semantic or paraphrase similarity, transitive clustering, approximate MinHash/LSH, automatic keep/drop decisions, or manifest mutation.
You need a duplicate, authorship, provenance, quality, AI/human, or selection verdict; containment tiers are operationally uncalibrated measurements only.
You cannot keep the explicit descriptor manifest, index, checkpoint, and report artifacts in an operator-controlled local workspace.

inputs.target: strict UTF-8 staged-descriptor JSONL plus local bounded UTF-8 documents; build-index writes a named index and checkpoint directory, query-doc reads an exact-pinned index plus a named query document and writes a report, and batch-report reads an exact-pinned index and writes a report/checkpoint.
required: explicit staged-descriptor JSONL or exact-pinned local index, as required by the selected mode
optional: --resume for a compatible immutable checkpoint directory

artifacts: setec-shingle-index/1 sealed SQLite inverted index with raw and logical SHA-256 seals
setec-shingle-checkpoint/1 immutable inventory, build, or batch resume shards
setec-shingle-report/1 canonical private candidate report with opaque IDs only
aggregate-only canonical JSON receipts on stdout and progress records on stderr

compute.cost_note: Standard-library exact token/shingle and SQLite work only; CPU-only, no model, API, network, corpus fixture, or GPU path. Bounded by frozen input, posting, pair, SQLite, checkpoint, and report ceilings.

examples.description: Build a sealed exact-shingle index from explicit staged descriptors
Write a deterministic same-draft cross-stage candidate report
examples.cmd: python3 plugins/setec-voiceprint/scripts/shingle_dedup.py batch-report --index staged.sqlite --index-sha256 INDEX_SHA256 --report-out candidates.json --checkpoint-dir batch-state
